rationale.root_cause: No response was provided, so it did not identify the use-after-free where data is freed and then passed to printLine in the bad variant.
rationale.local_fix: No fix was proposed; it did not suggest moving the print before free or keeping the buffer allocated until after use.
rationale.global_fix: No ownership/lifetime strategy (e.g., RAII or explicit ownership conventions) was proposed.
